data.message: Monday reset: write down your top 3 tasks before you open email or Slack. Small habit, big focus boost.
Hot take: half of all meetings could've been a two-line message. What's your most pointless recurring meeting?
Shortcut of the day: Cmd+Shift+T reopens the tab you just accidentally closed. You're welcome.
What's the one VS Code (or browser) extension you can't live without? Drop it in the comments.
Mid-week reminder: progress beats perfection. Ship the rough version, improve it later.
Big milestone today — we just crossed 1,000 users! Thank you to everyone who's been along for the ride.
TIL you can batch-rename files in Finder: select them all, right-click, Rename. Saved me 10 minutes today.
Throwback to our very first prototype. Funny how far a rough idea can go when you keep iterating.
Friday wins thread! Share one thing — big or small — that you shipped this week.
Weekend reading: three solid articles on writing cleaner code. Links in the comments.
Lazy Saturday energy: coffee, a quiet room, and one stubborn bug.
Planning the week ahead. What's the one thing you most want to build or finish?
